entry.title: THJCC CTF 2026 沒時間玩 :(
entry.content:
Weclome

Welcome to THJCC CTF

Descript:In this CTF, unless otherwise specified, the flag format is THJCC{.*}
write up:開啟開發人員工具即可發現flag

Reverse

Super baby reverse

Descript:My first C lang project can you find the hidden message inside?
write up:先查看整體組合語言

發現有strcmp，用來比較兩字串，在此製造斷點並查看暫存器即可

Fllllllag_ch3cker_again?

Descript:Flag chekcer again?????????
write up:使用 gdb 查看後發現是 C++

慢慢一個一個用 echo '' | c++filt 找 operator== (我就爛

然後在 基底位址 + 偏移量 加上斷點並執行，查看暫存器即可

Misc

IMAGE?

Descript:Check the hex of this image
write up:使用 binwalk 檢查並提取檔案即可

Web

Las Vegas

Descript:Lucky 7 7 7
write up:使用 Burp Suite 修改拉下拉霸機後的封包並送出即可

0422

Descript:A very simple challenge about a web exploit. Really simple. LOL.
write up:使用 Burp Suite 將登入時cookie帶的role改成admin即可

entry.title: 新生始業輔導志工
entry.content:
此篇文章為志工心得

過程


很高興能在我高二時到學校擔任 新生始業輔導志工 (以下簡稱蚯蚓)，帶領學弟們融入我們這個大家庭，過程很有趣同時也有著許多不為人知的辛苦前置作業。

我們在新訓的前一天就在學校裡面度過了一天，不只練習了今年專屬的舞步，同時也在 學習如何更好的帶領一個團隊，當晚也就住在學校的學生宿舍內待命了，準備迎接明天的新生們~~

我這次擔任蚯蚓不僅僅是為了帶領新生而已，更是為了彌補我自己還是新生時因為班上剛好有人確診而被迫全班回家，導致我沒有看到 新生專屬的營火晚會、火鳥以及火舞表演，也是高中生活中的唯一一個機會能夠看到如此壯觀的活動在學校內舉辦。


很開心能夠和一群新生代們開心的過了完整的兩天，或許我們的帶領能力不是一流的，但還是很感謝你們的配合，不是你們的配合整個活動也不會如此順利。

成長

在擔任蚯蚓的過程中，我不僅學到了透過簡潔明瞭的肯定句能夠更加有效的帶領一群人，避免了許多的誤解，我也讓自己在面對群眾時能夠更加自信的 展現自己，畢竟每個人都會有屬於自己的第一次，不必過度緊張，適度的對自己更加自信能夠增加自己的穩定性。

entry.title: The first Traveling
entry.content:
Traveling

Prefer japan

I want to say why I prefer it after traveling in Japan.

Reason one

Taiwan which is the country I live in, is often said to be the best place to travel or to live in. But in my opinion, I think it is not. Many people say “Oh Taiwanese are friendly and the landscape is beautiful!!” I can’t say they are wrong but I think maybe it is my problem because I have lived here for about two decades, I knowing the custom here and many things are daily for me, everything is boring to me.

Reason two

2024/1/23 I traveled to Japan, I saw many new scapes and people.
Everything is fresh to me, I’m like a baby full of curiosity and vitality. I took many pictures, eat many food, watch many beautiful things. I like its JR, it is clean, quiet, fast and more friendly but a fly in the ointment was too complicated, there were about 30 stops in a train station, so it was difficult to find the stop I want to go. I was impressed by the first sky I saw when I got off the plane, is the bluest and cleanest sky I ever seen.

Reason three

ㅤㅤ To be honest, noise from cars and motorcycles are more quiet. I didn’t hear any noise from motorcycles like exploding boom it was a point why I prefer Japan. Another point is friendly and safety to pedestrians, you don’t need to be careful when you are crossing the road, they don’t like Taiwanese, they will stop and wait you to cross the road, is amazing to me although Taiwan have already make law to limit the driver need stop to wait the pedestrian cross the road, many drivers don’t follow the law so we still need to stop and look around to ensure we won’t be hit by the driver, the law is a joke, I don’t know why the government writes a law but don’t fully executed.

The last reason

ㅤㅤ The other point is the clean city. In Taiwan, you will see people spit something disgusting in their mouth to the ground arbitrary I can’t stand that, can you imagine when you walk around the streets then you should be care if you don’t want to step on anything disgusting? However, you will be scared by the red things on the ground, it isn’t the blood, is betel nut, something can cheer people. In Japan, I didn’t see any dirty things on the ground or anywhere, even the lane.
ㅤ

Dream

My dream : live in Japan

Photo

Here are some photo for you guys to appreciate.







END

entry.title: picoCTF writeup
entry.content:
ℹ️總覽

這裡用來記錄我得 picoCTF 解題紀錄，包含完整解題方法及 flag，依照題目類別分類，請點擊下方連結以閱覽更多詳細資訊。

Binary Exploitation

Cryptography

Forensics

General Skills

Reverse Engineering

Web Exploitation

web

entry.title: ZERO JUDGE 解題紀錄 - main
entry.content:
ℹ️總覽

這裡記錄了我在ZeroJudge解題的思路及感想，且按照題目分類整理。從基礎輸入輸出至演算法，每道題目皆包含程式碼以及解題觀念，較困難題目可能含有詳細思路。
目前包含題數：28 題
程式語言：C & C++

Notice: 因讀取問題，將檔案分開存放，有需要請點及下方連結以查看

基礎題庫 1-21 題

基礎題庫 22-27 題

UVa 題庫
